settings.headline: Flower delivery in Washington Heights, since 2004.
settings.lede: Primavera is the family florist on the corner of 187th and Fort Washington. Familia Guzmán since 2004. We hand-deliver across all of Washington Heights, Hudson Heights, Inwood, and Marble Hill the same afternoon. Order by 2 PM. We text you a photo before it leaves the shop.
settings.body_html:
The Washington Heights florist on the corner.

If you live in 10032, 10033, 10034, or 10040, we are the closest real florist to your door. Not a 1-800 wire service. Not a marketplace that routes your order to whoever's available. A small shop on Fort Washington Avenue with our own buyer at the 28th Street market most mornings, our own designer at the bench, and our own driver walking or driving your bouquet to the recipient's door.

Where we deliver.

Free hand-delivery zone (every order, no minimum):

  • Washington Heights (10032, 10033, 10040)
  • Hudson Heights and Castle Village
  • Inwood (10034) and the Cloisters
  • Hamilton Heights, West Harlem (10031, 10039)

Same-day with a small fee:

  • Marble Hill, South Bronx (10463, 10468, 10469): +$10
  • Rest of Manhattan: $15 (free over $125)
  • Bronx, Queens, Brooklyn: $25 (we ship same-day if ordered before 2 PM)

What makes us different from 1-800-Flowers.

  1. Real florist. Not a wire service. We tie every arrangement at the bench at 463 Fort Washington. The bouquet you order is the bouquet that arrives.
  2. Photo before delivery. We text or email you a picture of your actual bouquet, not a stock photo, before our driver heads out. If something looks off, reply. We remake it.
  3. Bilingual. Hablamos español. Toda la familia. Llámanos al (917) 770-1684 si lo prefieres.
  4. Family-owned since 2004. Familia Guzmán. Two decades on the same corner. We know the doormen on Pinehurst. We've sent flowers to every funeral home and school auditorium in the neighborhood.
  5. Same-day cutoff: 2 PM. Earlier than national chains. Means our designer has time to actually build the arrangement, not throw it together.

Most-ordered for the Heights.

Our top-selling SKUs in this zone are Pink Garden Roses (the most popular gift in the shop), Designer's Choice (we pick the freshest stems at market that morning), Sympathy Standing Sprays (direct to Ortiz Funeral Home and Schwartz Brothers Memorial Chapels), and Día de las Madres specials (May only). For weekly delivery, see our subscription tiers.

Hospital deliveries.

We deliver to NewYork-Presbyterian Columbia Irving Medical Center (622 W 168th St), Milstein Hospital (177 Fort Washington Ave), Morgan Stanley Children's Hospital (3959 Broadway), and NewYork-Presbyterian Allen Hospital (5141 Broadway). Hospital-friendly arrangements (no scent, no soil for ICU) on request.

Funeral home deliveries.

Direct relationships with Ortiz Funeral Home (4425 Broadway), Schwartz Brothers Memorial Chapels, Riverdale Funeral Home, and every funeral home north of 155th Street. Tell us which chapel and the service time. We coordinate placement directly with the staff. Many of them know us by name.
settings.faq_html:
What ZIP codes do you deliver to free?

10032, 10033, 10034, 10040, 10031, and 10039. That's all of Washington Heights, Hudson Heights, Inwood, and Hamilton Heights. Free hand-delivery, every order, no minimum.

What's the same-day cutoff?

2:00 PM Monday through Saturday. Earlier than 1-800-Flowers and Ode à la Rose. Order before then and our driver delivers same afternoon.

Do you deliver to Marble Hill or Riverdale?

Yes. Marble Hill (10463) and the south Bronx are same-day with a $10 fee. Riverdale and the north Bronx are same-day with a $25 fee.

Can I pick up at the shop?

Yes. Walk into 463 Fort Washington Ave any day before 6 PM. Mention you saw us online and we'll throw in a free single rose with your order.

¿Hablan español?

Sí. Toda la familia. Llámanos al (917) 770-1684 o pásate por la tienda en 463 Fort Washington Ave. Ver en español.

Can I send flowers from out of town?

Yes. We get a lot of orders from kids in college sending flowers to their mom in WaHi for her birthday. Order online, give us her address, we walk it over.
settings.final_lede: From the corner shop. Photo before delivery. Walked to your door.
